message:
chore(beads): log RevocationPush architectural gap on 2ot4f

GossipMessage::RevocationPush(RevocationPushMessage) is defined with a
signature: Option<NodeSignature> field but no handler exists anywhere
in the codebase — grep confirms all GossipMessage matches are
test-only (line 2537 Summary, 3875 RevocationPush roundtrip).

When gossip transport dispatch is eventually wired, the handler MUST:
(a) verify msg.signature against sending node key before trusting
revoked_ids/new_rev_seq
(b) make signature mandatory or reject unsigned pushes
(c) bound hop propagation to prevent replay-amplification
(d) monotonically advance rev_seq

Logged rather than patched because the handler design needs a
key-lookup callback + revocation registry + peer list that should be
built alongside GossipMessage dispatch as a unit.

Total architectural gaps logged today: 4 (gossip handle_summary sig,
MeshNode handle_symbol_ack sig, MeshNode handle_decode_status sig,
RevocationPush no-handler + sig-Optional).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
